blockers.description: host_permissions are broad and require release justification before public publication.
Provider/runtime paths must remain gated until provider consent, redaction, evidence and release review are complete.
Current evidence target is 127.0.0.1; IPv6 ::1 remains a documented caveat.
LAN candidate behavior requires explicit public release posture before publication.
Legacy provider prompt naming debt requires review before provider release.
Minor mixed microcopy requires final visible copy review before public release.
Clean Runtime and DevTools evidence exist; final release candidate packaging/store/rollback evidence remains required.
Local installed QA is not equivalent to packaged signed public release readiness.
